name: Opik
description: Export OpenClaw LLM traces to Opik

enabled.label: Tracing Enabled
enabled.help: Enable Opik trace export while the plugin is loaded.

apiKey.label: Opik API Key
apiKey.help: Optional for local deployments; defaults to OPIK_API_KEY.

apiUrl.label: Opik API URL
apiUrl.help: Defaults to OPIK_URL_OVERRIDE when not set.

tags.label: Default Tags
tags.help: List of tags applied to every created trace.
